card_name: Deadly Golden Great Ape Son Goku
ip_outcome_note: The card name 'Deadly Golden Great Ape Son Goku' directly names the character and transformation. The card text confirms 'Baby Saga' era and requires a 'Son Goku : GT' Leader Card, placing this as Goku's Golden Great Ape form from Dragon Ball GT — specifically the arc where Old Kai regrew Goku's tail allowing him to transform while a Super Saiyan, ultimately leading to Super Saiyan 4. The golden-furred roaring ape in the vision matches the canonical Golden Great Ape appearance exactly. ip_confidence already high, confirmed.

trivia_bullets.text: The Golden Great Ape is a Dragon Ball GT-exclusive transformation: a Saiyan achieves it by looking at a full moon or planetary body while already a Super Saiyan, resulting in golden fur instead of the standard brown Great Ape. In GT, Goku uses this form during the Baby Saga after Old Kai regrows his tail — and controlling the form allows Saiyans to access Super Saiyan 4. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Golden Great Ape (via WebSearch)]
sources: WebSearch: Golden Great Ape Dragon Ball GT Baby Vegeta Son Goku transformation lore

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-080 carries 25000 power (the highest among the BT4 Goku commons), a Swap 5 trigger for 'Goku's Lineage' cards, and a tutor effect on play (search deck for a Goku's Lineage card with cost 5 or less). Uniquely, the card cannot be played unless the Leader is 'Son Goku : GT' — a hard restriction making it GT-deck-only. [DBZ Exchange: BT4-080 card listing; getthosemons.co.nz listing]

BT4-080 is one of two Secret Rare-adjacent designs in BT4 Colossal Warfare that showcases the set's 'monstrous transformation' aesthetic — the other apex being the Super Saiyan 4 Goku Secret Rares. The common-rarity Golden Great Ape serves as the entry-level preview of the GT transformation chain for players who can't pull the Secret Rare. [Cardmarket: Colossal Warfare set page; WebSearch]
sources: WebSearch: DBS BT4 Colossal Warfare set details
